sigdevs.headline: CDC Says As Of November 13, Total Of 104 People Infected With The Outbreak Strain Of E. Coli O157H7 Have Been Reported From 14 U.S. States

sigdevs.description: May 27 (Reuters) - :UBER ADDS TO ITS DELIVERY HERO STAKE AT €12BN VALUATION - FT.UBER ACQUIRED ASPEX MANAGEMENT’S 14.6 PER CENT STAKE IN DELIVERY HERO EARLIER THIS WEEK THROUGH - FT.UBER AGREED TO PAY SLIGHTLY BELOW €40 PER SHARE, VALUING DELIVERY HERO AT ABOUT €12BN - FT.AFTER THE ACQUISITION FROM ASPEX, UBER NOW HOLDS AN ECONOMIC INTEREST CLOSE TO 37 PER CENT- FT.
